# Agent Learnings

This file is the shared knowledge base for all agents in the Relish Pilates repository.
It is read by every agent at the start of each task. It is written exclusively by the `reflective` agent.

**Do not edit this file manually unless correcting a factual error.**

---

## Active Rules

Rules promoted from repeated failures (≥3 occurrences). Every agent filters this table for its relevant categories before starting work.

| ID | Category | Rule | Source Failures | Added |
|----|----------|------|-----------------|-------|

---

## Failure Log

Running log of observed failures. When a category + signature reaches 3 occurrences, the reflective agent extracts a rule.

| ID | Category | Error Signature | Count | Last Seen | Status |
|----|----------|-----------------|-------|-----------|--------|

---

## Resolved Rules

Failures that have been promoted into Active Rules and cleared from the log.

| ID | Original Category | Rule | Resolved Date | Reason |
|----|-------------------|------|---------------|--------|
